sources: Danger Assessment (DA) - Campbell et al., Johns Hopkins University
ODARA - Ontario Domestic Assault Risk Assessment
WHO Multi-country Study on Women's Health and Domestic Violence
CDC National Intimate Partner and Sexual Violence Survey (NISVS)

key_findings.strangulation: Single strongest predictor of homicide (Campbell et al., 2003)
key_findings.weapon_access: Increases lethality risk by 5x (Campbell et al., 2003)
key_findings.recent_separation: Separation assault is extremely high risk (Block, 2003)
key_findings.forced_sex: Strong predictor of severe violence (Campbell & Soeken, 1999)
key_findings.escalation: Violence pattern is critical indicator (Dutton & Kropp, 2000)
